name: Justin Maine
description:
Work has kept you busy all day

For your boyfriend? That's sacrilege!

_______________________________________________________________________

Your twink boyfriend

The love of your life

The warmth in your cold mornings

and the icy breeze in your hot afternoons

is throwing a tantrum because your job has kept you away from him during the day

So, sir,

take responsibility for your actions.

_______________________________________________________________________

My playlist I listen to while creating and using these bots 😌🎧💋: Just chill and vibes

_______________________________________________________________________

Hello hello! A quick little message from Kona 💌

FIRST OF ALL: THANK YOU SO MUCH TO MY 5.232 FOLLOWERS!

I love each and every one of you more than I can put into words hehe

I'll be honest with you, this one was a little selfish NJMDKSNJF I made this bot mostly for me and that's why the description might not be as detailed or as clear as what I usually aim for.

If it doesn't fully meet the standard I normally set for myself, I truly apologize

That said, this bot came from a very genuine place and I had a lot of fun creating it, I really hope you enjoy it as much as I enjoyed making it!

As always, thank you for being here hehe I love you all so so much uwuwuwu 💖

All feedback is welcome!

_______________________________________________________________________

ENGLISH IS NOT MY MAIN LANGUAGE !!!
creator: konakano
